name: Savory Wild Rice Dinner Muffins
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Wild Rice Pancake/Waffle Mix (Arrowhead Mills)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Stir the dry ingredients together in a large bowl.
3. In a separate bowl, beat the liquids together.
4. Add the dry mixture to the liquids and stir until well combined.
5. Divide the batter evenly into 12 oiled muffin tins.
6. Bake for 20 minutes or until done.
